news.summary: In Fornebu, Norway on May 14, 2025, Aker Carbon Capture ASA (ACC) made a stock exchange announcement about selling their 20% ownership stake in SLB Capturi to Aker ASA on May 9, 2025. This transaction was significant for ACC and marked an important development in their strategic partnership with Aker ASA.
news.headline: Aker Carbon Capture ASA to pay cash dividend after selling 20% ownership in SLB Capturi to Aker ASA.

news.summary: In Grinnell, Iowa, a ribbon cutting ceremony for the new Empowerment Command Center and Affordable Housing Project will be held on May 21, 2025, at 11:00 am. The event, organized by Central Iowa Shelter & Services (CISS) and Iowa Total Care, will take place at 306 6th Ave. This initiative aims to address housing challenges and empower community members.
news.headline: CISS and Iowa Total Care open Empowerment Command Center and Affordable Housing Project in Grinnell on May 21 at 11:00 am.

news.summary: As of May 14, 2025, experts predict that the worldwide market for modular construction is set to expand significantly, with an estimated value of approximately USD 162.42 billion by the year 2030. This growth is expected to occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.9% between 2025 and 2030. The data comes from a recent study conducted by Grand View Research, Inc., citing factors like increasing demand for...
news.headline: Global modular construction market to hit $162.42B by 2030 at 7.9% CAGR - Grand View Research, Inc.

news.summary: Dickerson has been recognized for her achievements in the private equity sector, making it to PE Hub's 2025 "Women in Private Equity" list and receiving an honorable mention from Mergers & Acquisitions on its "2025 Most Influential Women in Private Equity M&A" list. The announcement was made in San Francisco on May 14, 2025. Genstar Capital, a prominent private equity firm, was mentioned in the news.
news.headline: Melissa Dickerson of Genstar Capital named to 2025 "Women in Private Equity" list on PE Hub and earned honorable mention on Mergers & Acquisitions "Most Influential Women in Private Equity M&A" list.

news.summary: In a recent development on May 14, 2025, CapitalSoft Inc. successfully completed the acquisition of assets previously managed by Laru Technologies, a well-known provider of fraud detection and risk management software for electronic bank transactions. The deal was facilitated by Viking Mergers & Acquisitions. CapitalSoft Inc., established in 2004, has taken over the assets to enhance its services in the financial sector. This acquisition marks a significant move for both companies and underscores the continuous evolution of the industry.
news.headline: CapitalSoft Inc. acquires Laru Technologies, trusted fraud detection provider, joining forces for ebpIQ venture. (Characters: 104)

news.summary: The 45th anniversary of Women in Health Administration (WHA), a prominent nonprofit advocating for women in healthcare leadership, will be commemorated on May 16, 2025, with a tribute gathering at the luxurious SLS Hotel in Beverly Hills. This event will pay homage to eight notable executives and will showcase a keynote panel discussion, among other activities.
news.headline: WHA celebrates 45th anniversary on May 16, 2025, at SLS Hotel in Beverly Hills, honoring eight leaders in healthcare.

news.summary: A prominent company in AI-driven veterinary technology, Vetsie, has recently disclosed a significant collaboration with the Merck Veterinary Manual. The partnership aims to bolster clinical decision-making for contemporary veterinary teams. This venture involves incorporating Merck's reliable and evidence-based medical content into Vetsie's platform, incorporating crucial information for veterinarians.
news.headline: Vetsie partners with Merck Veterinary Manual to enhance clinical support for vet teams; integrates evidence-based content.

news.summary: Families with special needs children frequently encounter a challenging and solitary path that can be emotionally overwhelming. In her impactful memoir titled "Finding My Stride: A Guide to Finding Power Raising a Child with Special Needs," Catherine Marsden, who is both an author and a triathlete, delivers a poignant message of understanding and optimism. The book serves as a source of comfort and reassurance for parents navigating this journey, providing insights and support in dealing with the complexities and difficulties they may face. Through her personal experiences, Marsden offers a beacon of hope to others in similar situations, urging them to find their own strength and resilience in caring for their special needs child.
news.headline: The new memoir by Ironman Triathlete Catherine Marsden, "Finding My Stride," sheds light on raising a child with special needs, offering empathy and hope.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on May 14, 2025, a luxurious spa experience at The St. Regis Bora Bora Resort introduces a new Ayurvedic Abyanga Massage. The private island Spa aims to blend ancient and modern wellness practices to enhance relaxation and rejuvenation. This curated offering is designed to tap into the healing power of Ayurveda, providing guests with a unique opportunity to indulge in a holistic approach to wellness. The launch of this experience is part of the spa's initiative to cater to the growing demand for wellness tourism, catering to a diverse clientele seeking serenity and self-care.
news.headline: The St. Regis Bora Bora Resort introduces new Bora Bora Bliss Getaway at Private Island Spa, combining ancient & modern wellness practices. Celebrating the launch of Ayurvedic Abyanga Massage.

news.summary: In Palo Alto, California on May 14, 2025, Bluedot revealed its partnership with Rivian's Mobile Service fleet operations to enhance EV charging. Bluedot's cutting-edge platform will optimize Rivian's charging process, marking a significant advancement in EV fleet management.
news.headline: Bluedot partners with Rivian to enhance EV fleet charging with innovative platform in 2025.

news.summary: A recent study found that the global population reached 7.8 billion people, with an estimated 3.6 billion internet users worldwide. This represents an internet penetration rate of 46%, indicating a significant increase in online connectivity. Additionally, the study revealed that 4.2 billion people still lack access to the internet, highlighting the ongoing digital divide. The research emphasized the importance of addressing this disparity to ensure equal opportunities for all individuals in the digital age.
news.headline: Surge in gold prices prompts Turkish buyers to spend big on properties and vehicles.

news.summary: Recently, data was released indicating a significant increase in the number of unemployment claims filed last month. A total of 1.5 million claims were submitted, reflecting a 30% jump compared to the previous month. This surge is attributed to the continuous impact of the ongoing pandemic on the job market. The rise in claims has heightened concerns about the economic recovery and the financial stability of individuals and families. The statistics highlight the urgent need for further support and intervention to address the challenges posed by the current crisis.
news.headline: Leading tech companies boost stock market, while dollar falls. Market overview.

news.summary: In a recent development, Industrial Logistics Group, LLC (ILG) has been established by consolidating three distribution companies owned by Industrial Realty Group. This venture brings together the operations of these companies, located across five different locations in the United States. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on May 14, 2025. The formation of ILG signifies a strategic move to streamline and unify the operations of Industrial Realty Group's businesses. This consolidation aims to enhance efficiency and effectiveness in the distribution sector.
news.headline: Industrial Logistics Group consolidates 3 distribution companies in 5 US locations creating a new venture.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in Miami and Newport Beach, California, Sun Country Marine, the primary boat dealership group on the West Coast, is restating its enduring alliance with Boats Group, the top digital solutions provider in the marine sector. Sun Country Marine, known for its authority in the industry, and Boats Group, the leader in digital solutions, are reinforcing their collaboration for the long term.
news.headline: Sun Country Marine Group reaffirms partnership with Boats Group for premium boating experiences. Largest boat dealership on West Coast.

news.summary: Summer Mersinger, a CFTC commissioner, will become the next CEO of the Blockchain Association, replacing Kristin Smith on June 2. Mersinger's term at the CFTC was set to last until April 2028, but she will leave the agency on May 30. Her departure allows President Trump to nominate a new member to the CFTC as rules restrict the number of commissioners from the same political party to three. The CFTC and SEC both impact digital assets, and Congress is working on legislation to clarify regulatory roles. Stay tuned for updates on this developing story.
news.headline: CFTC commissioner to lead Blockchain Association as CEO, stepping down from regulatory role, effective June 2. #news #crypto

news.summary: The latest statistics reveal that the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases in the country has surpassed 500,000, with the death toll reaching over 10,000. Health officials are urgently advising the public to adhere to safety guidelines and protocols in order to curb the spread of the virus. In response to the escalating crisis, government authorities have implemented stricter measures, including mandatory mask mandates and limitations on public gatherings. The situation remains critical as hospitals are reaching full capacity, emphasizing the importance of individual vigilance in preventing further transmission of the virus.
news.headline: DEWA PJSC included in the MSCI Emerging Markets Index, reflecting 12.3% growth.

news.summary: In Tamarac, Florida, on May 14, 2025, PuroClean, a top property restoration and remediation franchise, collaborated with educators across the country for supply drives. This initiative is in celebration of National Teacher Appreciation Week.
news.headline: PuroClean launches Adopt A Classroom Campaign to support educators with supply drives nationwide.

news.summary: Celebrating Remarkable Women Entrepreneurs in the beauty industry, a second annual Visionary Awards cocktail party was hosted by CEW in Los Angeles on May 14, 2025. The event, presented by Harris Williams, aimed to acknowledge female leadership and promote the progress of women in the sector. The live gathering included a significant number of attendees as industry professionals raised a toast to the accomplishments of women in business.
news.headline: CEW hosts 2nd Annual Visionary Awards in LA, honoring female entrepreneurs in beauty industry, presented by Harris Williams.

news.summary: Ethereum (ETH) has seen a significant increase in value, currently priced at around $2665.70, representing a notable gain of over 44% within the past seven days, as per CoinMarketCap. In the last 24 hours alone, there has been an 8.42% surge, indicating strong bullish momentum towards the $3000 threshold, driven by institutional investments and network updates. The rally has boosted Ethereum's market capitalization to approximately $322.23 billion, surpassing giants like Alibaba Group Holding Ltd (BABA) at $303.72 billion and Coca-Cola Co (KO) at $297.17 billion. This surge, coinciding with a broader uptrend in the crypto market, has been fueled by increased institutional interest, notably highlighted by a significant investment from London-based Abraxas Capital. For more detailed information, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Ethereum approaches $3000, surging 44% in 7 days to $2665.70. Market cap now $322.23 billion surpassing Alibaba & Coca-Cola.

news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Argentina Social Commerce Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics Databook" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The social commerce market in Argentina is projected to increase by 29.8% yearly, with an estimated value of US$3.11 billion by 2025. Between 2021 and 2024, the market saw a remarkable compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 43.9%. This growth indicates a strong trend towards social commerce within the country, with a significant impact on various sectors and consumer demographics.
news.headline: Argentina's social commerce market set to grow 29.8% yearly, reaching US$3.11 billion by 2025 with a CAGR of 43.9% from 2021-2024.

news.summary: In Valencia, California, on May 14, 2025, Cunard reaffirms its partnership with the Royal Canadian Geographical Society (RCGS) for the year 2025. The company reveals the impressive roster of speakers for the Alaska 2025 season aboard the newly renovated Queen Elizabeth. The lineup features renowned RCGS speakers, underscoring Cunard's commitment to providing enriching experiences for guests.
news.headline: Cunard partners with RCGS for 2025 Alaska season speaker series on Queen Elizabeth; emphasizing knowledge about geography.

news.summary: In The Woodlands, Texas, on May 14, 2025, The Woodlands Christian Academy recently upgraded to a Pivot® Performance Turf field by Hellas, A TenCate Company. Since the installation, both the players and teams have observed a significant improvement in athletic performance. The new turf is proving to be a game-changer for the academy, enhancing their overall sporting experiences.
news.headline: Pivot® Performance Turf boosts athletic performance at Woodlands Academy. New field by Hellas improves player advantage.

news.summary: In Chicago on May 14, 2025, a new mobile app called PalSource is empowering small content creators by offering them the opportunity to monetize their expertise without the need for sponsorships or a high number of followers. This app is changing the game for influencers who previously believed they needed tens of thousands of followers to generate income. PalSource is now accessible to users seeking a platform to turn their knowledge into earnings, regardless of their follower count or sponsorship deals.
news.headline: PalSource app supports small creators without sponsorships, follower minimums. CHICAGO, May 14, 2025 - empowering creators of all sizes to earn income.

news.summary: During the fourth quarter of 2025, Dynatrace, Inc (NYSE: DT) released its financial results. The company's quarterly revenue surged by 17% year-over-year, reaching $445.17 million, surpassing the analyst consensus of $434.78 million. The adjusted EPS stood at $0.33, an increase from $0.30, also surpassing the analyst consensus of $0.30. This positive performance is attributed to the strong sales in various cloud services. Investors can find more detailed information on this report on the Benzinga.com website.
news.headline: Dynatrace reports 17% revenue growth to $445.17 million in Q4 2025, beats estimates. EPS $0.33, up from $0.30.

news.summary: A biosecurity innovation company, Lit Thinking, has introduced the Visium Vanguard Program in Orlando, Florida. This initiative offers 50 chosen facilities the chance to utilize the Visium Far-UVC technology at no cost. Visium brings a new approach to reducing pathogen transmission in facilities, employing advanced autonomous technology for operational resiliency and enhanced defense mechanisms. This program aims to showcase the transformative effects of Visium and its benefits in improving biosecurity.
news.headline: Lit Thinking introduced Visium Vanguard Program, offering free Visium Far-UVC technology pilot to 50 facilities.

news.summary: Azamara Cruises has announced a lineup of 68 immersive cruises for the upcoming season, which will also feature six Grand Voyages. The cruise line will be revisiting highly-rated ports across Europe, Asia, and the Americas. Known for its focus on Destination Immersion® and Extended Destination Days, Azamara Cruises remains committed to providing unique and enriching experiences for travelers. This season promises to offer a diverse range of destinations and activities for guests to explore. The itineraries are designed to immerse passengers in the local culture and allow for in-depth exploration at each port of call.
news.headline: Azamara Cruises unveil 68 immersive cruises and six Grand Voyages for Summer 2027, visiting top ports worldwide.

news.summary: Haviv Ilan, the President and CEO of Texas Instruments Incorporated (TI) (Nasdaq: TXN), is scheduled to present at the upcoming Bernstein 41st Annual Strategic Decisions Conference in New York City. The event is set to take place on Friday, May 30, starting at 11 a.m. Eastern time. Ilan will be addressing important matters during the conference.
news.headline: TI CEO Haviv Ilan to speak at Bernstein investor conference in NYC on May 30, 2025, at 11 a.m. Eastern time.

news.summary: In Bronx, New York, on May 14, 2025, Montefiore Einstein shared news of receiving a significant boost. The Henry and Lucy Moses Campus secured a game-changing $4.5 million grant from the Mother Cabrini Health Foundation. This marks the largest nursing-oriented funding ever received by the organization.
news.headline: Montefiore Einstein Moses Campus receives $4.5M grant from Mother Cabrini Health Foundation for nursing excellence - largest grant in history.

news.summary: The winners of the Leadership, Hall of Fame, and Lifetime Achievement Awards for 2025 have been unveiled by the Specialty Food Association in an announcement made on May 14, 2025. Dubbed the "People Awards," these accolades honor individuals who have demonstrated exceptional dedication and contributions to the specialty food industry. These prestigious recognitions highlight the outstanding achievements of leaders in this sector.
news.headline: Specialty Food Association reveals 2025 Leadership, Hall of Fame, and Lifetime Achievement winners, known as "People Awards".

news.summary: Solana (SOL) has surged by 6.2% in the last 24 hours, reaching $181.54, surpassing the broader crypto market's 12.7% increase this week. This spike has resulted in a 23.4% rise for SOL over the week and a 37.14% increase over the past month, as reported by CoinMarketCap. This uptrend follows the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission's postponement of a decision on Grayscale's proposed Solana ETF, indicating a positive momentum with improving on-chain fundamentals, ecosystem growth, and increased investor interest. The SEC's delay does not signify any conclusions and has invited public comments on the proposed rule change, calming immediate market reactions. Analysts anticipate approval later this year. Additionally, major players are accumulating their SOL holdings. Nasdaq-listed DeFi companies are quietly amassing SOL assets.
news.headline: Solana's price rises by 6.2% to $181.54, surpassing the market's 12.7% increase this week. SOL is up 23.4% weekly and 37.14% monthly amidst SEC's ETF delay.

news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina-based company SPX FLOW is celebrating 125 years since the introduction of Gaulin homogenizing technology, which has been a part of the APV brand for more than 50 years. Gaulin homogenizers, the first of their kind in the industry, transformed dairy processing by enhancing product quality.
news.headline: 125 years of Gaulin homogenizers, part of APV brand for 50 years, revolutionized dairy processing. SPX FLOW celebrates.

news.summary: The Tampa Bay Lightning has signed a deal with the global streaming leader, making it the digital partner for six out of the last seven Stanley Cup® winners. The NHL playoffs, known as hockey's pursuit of the Stanley Cup®, are now in their second round. This partnership signals a trend in sports broadcasting, emphasizing the importance of digital platforms. This move comes as the Tampa Bay Lightning gears up for the ongoing playoffs, highlighting the growing influence of streaming services in sports media.
news.headline: ViewLift partners with 6 of last 7 Stanley Cup winners, including Tampa Bay Lightning, for digital streaming.

news.summary: Portland Bolt & Manufacturing Co., LLC, a notable anchor bolts and construction fasteners manufacturer, disclosed the acquisition of Bennett Bolt Works, a New York-based company specializing in bolts and fasteners for various construction purposes. Established in 1978, Bennett Bolt Works, based in Jordan, New York, is known for its high-quality products for highway guardrail systems, bridge construction, and overhead sign structures. Portland Bolt, a global supplier, continues to expand its reach with this acquisition.
news.headline: Portland Bolt acquires Bennett Bolt Works, a NY-based fastener manufacturer specializing in highway guardrails. Expanding operations in the industry.

news.summary: Concurrent Utility Services, a well-known company offering construction, installation, and maintenance services for power and telecom providers in the southeastern region, has recently introduced a new division, Concurrent Environmental Services. This addition will expand the company's service offerings and provide further support to its clients. The incorporation of Concurrent Environmental Services showcases the company's commitment to enhancing its capabilities and diversifying its portfolio. This strategic move reflects Concurrent Utility Services' continued growth and dedication to meeting the evolving needs of the industry.
news.headline: Concurrent Utility Services introduces Concurrent Environmental Services; expands operations into environmental sector on May 14, 2025.

news.summary: Corsearch has introduced its latest technology for brand protection in New York on May 14. The new platform utilizes advanced AI and image recognition technology to enhance brand protection efforts. This innovation is designed to provide measurable return on investment for brand protection teams. By leveraging this cutting-edge technology, teams can accelerate their strategies and achieve concrete outcomes.
news.headline: Corsearch introduces AI-powered Corsearch Zeal 2.0 for brand protection, offering measurable ROI for brand teams.

news.summary: During the yearly Corbion General Shareholders Meeting on May 14, 2025, Karen-Marie Katholm and Abhijit Bhattacharya were appointed, while Liz Doherty was reappointed as members of the Supervisory Board.
news.headline: Corbion Shareholders Meeting okays Board appointments of Karen-Marie Katholm, Abhijit Bhattacharya & reappoints Liz Doherty.
